summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT two rows of 15 cells — top hidden states X_t (BLUE=H, ORANGE=L) with Markov transitions P=[[0.8, 0.2], [0.3, 0.7]]; bottom observations Y_t (RED/GREEN/BLUE) from emissions. ValueTracker t_tr reveals step-by-step via always_redraw + emission arrows. RIGHT shows P matrix + emission probabilities.
